Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select md5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM) ,

MD5(ATLAN_ASSET_USER_OWNER_ID_BK+VALID_FROM)

FROM

(

select a.GUID AS ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK,

a.USER_OWNER as ATLAN_ASSET_USER_OWNER_ID_BK

FROM

(

SELECT DISTINCT

GUID,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS USER_OWNER

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, USER_OWNERS

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

WHERE USER_OWNERS IS NOT NULL

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.USER_OWNERS, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY GUID, USER_OWNER) a


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_O


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_ASSET_USER_OWNER_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OW primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_ASSET_USER_OWNER_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER set comment = 'Table having list of USER owners associated with each physical asset';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'dimensional Key adding unique identifier';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_USER_OWNER.DIM_ASSET_USER_OWNER_KEY is
'artificially generated unique identifier for each group owner';
